{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set pageName="Licence number ..." %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% block content %}

{{ pageName }}

{% set summaryHtml %}

Summary

{{ govukSummaryList({ rows: [ { key: { text: "Licence holder" }, value: { text: licence.holder } }, { key: { text: "Licence version start date" }, value: { text: licence.startDate } }, { key: { text: "Licence version issue date" }, value: { text: licence.changeLog[0].versionIssueDate if licence.changeLog else "" } }, { key: { text: "End date" }, value: { text: licence.endDate } }, { key: { text: "Source of supply" }, value: { text: licence.source } }, { key: { text: "Purposes" }, value: { text: licence.purpose | join(", ") if licence.purpose else "" } }, { key: { text: "Periods of abstraction" }, value: { text: licence.periodStart + " to " + licence.periodEnd } }, { key: { text: "Points of abstraction" }, value: { html: (licence.absPoints | join("
")) if licence.absPoints else "" } }, { key: { text: "Monitoring station" }, value: { text: licence.monitoringStation } }, { key: { text: "Abstraction conditions" }, value: { text: licence.conditions | join(", ") if licence.conditions else "" } }, { key: { text: "Abstraction amounts" }, value: { text: licence.absQuantities } }, { key: { text: "Billing region" }, value: { text: licence.billingRegion } } ] }) }} {% endset -%} {% set pastDayHtml %} {% endset -%} {% set returnsHtml %}

Returns

{{ govukTable({ head: [ { text: "Case manager" }, { text: "Cases opened" }, { text: "Cases closed" } ], rows: [ [ { text: "David Francis" }, { text: "24" }, { text: "18" } ], [ { text: "Paul Farmer" }, { text: "16" }, { text: "20" } ], [ { text: "Rita Patel" }, { text: "24" }, { text: "27" } ] ] }) }} {% endset -%} {% set communicationsHtml %}

Communications

{{ govukTable({ head: [ { text: "Case manager" }, { text: "Cases opened" }, { text: "Cases closed" } ], rows: [ [ { text: "David Francis" }, { text: "98" }, { text: "95" } ], [ { text: "Paul Farmer" }, { text: "122" }, { text: "131" } ], [ { text: "Rita Patel" }, { text: "126" }, { text: "142" } ] ] }) }} {% endset -%} {{ govukTabs({ items: [ { label: "Summary", id: "Summary", panel: { html: summaryHtml } }, { label: "Returns", id: "Returns", panel: { html: returnsHtml } }, { label: "Communications", id: "Communications", panel: { html: communicationsHtml } } ] }) }}
{% endblock %}
